name: Calendar OI/funding Friday-Asia long alpha
description: Weak long-only BTC alpha combining funding flip, Asia session, Friday UTC, and negative basis context. It is not live-grade, but all train/test/eval/ytd splits are positive and it is orthogonal to REX price-location logic.
evidence: All major splits are positive with adequate trade counts, but risk-adjusted efficiency is far below target. Use as weak orthogonal alpha/sleeve candidate or LLM context feature, not as standalone live strategy.
leakage_guard: Scanner uses train quantile thresholds and reports train/test/eval/ytd splits. This candidate was selected as a weak all-positive filter after scan; do not promote without fresh OOS.

usage_recipe.as_alpha_feature: Emit +1 when all terms pass, else 0. Combine with portfolio/risk layer rather than trading alone.
usage_recipe.as_trade_rule: Long only; hold 144 bars; stride 12; no short leg.
usage_recipe.promotion_status: candidate_weak; below CAGR/strictMDD>=3 but useful as orthogonal derivatives/calendar signal.
